domain_hint: Single-stage axial compressor RANS CFD credibility assessment for the APEX-7 turbomachinery program, covering design-speed aerodynamic performance prediction
ambiguity_notes: (1) Inlet turbulence intensity contradicts between solver input (3.5%) and mesh team standard (1.2%), creating unresolved physical modeling uncertainty; (2) Turbulence model suitability is claimed as universally appropriate in the executive summary (Slide 13) but explicitly acknowledged as deficient at 110% speed in the methods section (Slide 5); (3) Validation agreement is selectively reported to the program office as "within 1%" when the 100% design-speed efficiency over-prediction is actually 1.52%, exceeding the stated threshold; (4) Program office memo characterizes APEX-7 as a direct APEX-5 derivative (implying inherited validation confidence) while the CFD team disputes this similarity, creating contradictory statements about the applicability of prior validation evidence.
